case_title: CALIFORNIA CARPET VS. SILVER ARROWS PAINT RESTORATION

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-27-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SILVER ARROWS PAINT RESTORATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CALIFORNIA CARPET AS TO DEFENDANT SILVER ARROWS PAINT RESTORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: ROBERTO MORALES) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CARPET AS TO DEFENDANT SILVER ARROWS PAINT RESTORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-31-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CARPET IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOHN WILSON. PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT SILVER ARROWS PAINT RESTORATION IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CARPET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVER ARROWS PAINT RESTORATION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2020 - JUDGMENT.
